'''Pencael IV''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pencael system/Legends|Pencael system]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the wealthy [[Cholus]] family, including Imperial [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Senn Cholus]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Scandium Team]] member [[Aven Cholus]].<ref name="SWAJ 11" />

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], a [[Republic Strategic Information Service]] operative disappeared in the refugee camps of Pencael Four.<ref name="SWTORCiGC">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Investigation|Missing SIS Agent}}</ref>
